description: Article number: M069BK3Lens colour: Black Frame colour: BlackLens type: Scratch resistant tinted glass lens with 100% UV 400 protection Frame type: Stylised thin metal frame in an aerodynamic design for absolute comfort and durability Oval lens for absolute style and protection from elements Flexible hinges for durability Flexible nose pads made of rubber with a double nose bridge to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skinWarranty: 1 yearWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
